g.text: Attention Score Matrix Construction: Q @ K^T Step-by-Step Computation

div.p: Architectural Insight: The Q @ K^T operation acts as a parallel lookup mechanism. By scaling by 1/√d_k, we ensure stable gradients during backpropagation.
score[i,j] = Σ(Q[i,:] · K^T[:,j]) = Σ(Q[i,k] · K[j,k]) for k=0 to d_k-1 = Q[i] · K[j]
This computes the semantic compatibility between position i and position j.

ul.li: s_ij = energy from query i to key j

div.p: Rationale: Prevents dot products from growing large, keeping Softmax gradients stable.
= q₂₀·k₁₀ + q₂₁·k₁₁ + ... + q₂₆₃·k₁₆₃ = Σₖ q₂ₖ · k₁ₖ (k=0..63)
